title: Yoga Shikha Upanishad: The Crown of Yoga
description: From the Yoga Shikha Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Yoga Shikha Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: When the breath is restrained, the mind is restrained. When the mind is restrained, the breath is restrained. The breath and the mind are intertwined like milk and water. They function together. They cease together.
